chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 564 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 20.11.2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. Even on last date of hearing, no one was present. Accordingly, this application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
